decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to utilize fast mana acceleration cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and Dark Ritual in combination with graveyard manipulation cards like Mental Note and Ill-Gotten Gains to quickly assemble a powerful win condition, such as Brain Freeze. The deck also includes tools for protection and card selection, such as Orim's Chant and Opt, as well as the ability to search for specific combo pieces with cards like Intuition and Cunning Wish. The mana base is designed to support the deck's fast mana requirements and ensure consistency in executing the combo.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells like Reanimate and Exhume. The deck also includes cards like Putrid Imp and Careful Study to help facilitate this strategy. By utilizing these cards efficiently, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures like Multani, Maro-Sorcerer and Akroma, Angel of Wrath. Additionally, cards like Sickening Dreams and Living Death provide additional ways to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up the reanimation combo.

This deck focuses on using Hermit Druid to fill the graveyard with creatures, allowing for combos with cards like Volrath's Shapeshifter, Phyrexian Devourer, and Triskelion. The deck also includes cards like Survival of the Fittest and Krosan Reclamation for added graveyard manipulation. The goal is to quickly assemble a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and recursive effects. The mana base is designed to support the deck's various color requirements and enable consistent combo setups.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, dealing damage quickly and efficiently. With a curve of low-cost creatures and direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, this deck aims to pressure the opponent early and finish the game before they have a chance to stabilize. Cards like Pyrostatic Pillar and Sulfuric Vortex help punish slower decks and prevent life gain, ensuring a fast and powerful aggressive strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells while controlling the board and dealing direct damage to the opponent. Key components include cards that force the opponent to discard cards, deal damage based on the opponent's hand size, and generate card advantage. With a mix of creature pressure and discard mechanics, the deck aims to win the game quickly and efficiently by disrupting the opponent's game plan while maintaining a strong presence on the battlefield.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's plays while utilizing Oath of Druids to quickly put powerful creatures into play. It aims to control the game through various disruptive cards like Sphere of Resistance and Pyroclasm, while using lands like Mishra's Factory and Treetop Village as creatures. The deck also has ways to deal with artifacts and enchantments through Naturalize, and can ramp up its mana with cards like Mox Diamond. Overall, the deck aims to establish board control and overpower the opponent with powerful creatures like Terravore.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and a way to cheat it into play with cards like Stifle, Boomerang, or Reality Ripple. The deck also utilizes countermagic and card selection to disrupt the opponent and protect the combo pieces, aiming to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a massive, game-winning creature. The deck aims to control the game tempo while setting up a quick and decisive win condition through the combo pieces.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Terravore to quickly overwhelm the opponent while disrupting their mana base with cards like Armageddon and Wasteland. The inclusion of Meddling Mage helps prevent the opponent from playing key spells, while Weathered Wayfarer helps fix mana and find key lands like Kor Haven. The deck also includes card draw and removal options like Swords to Plowshares and Sylvan Library, allowing for both aggressive and controlling plays. Overall, this deck aims to apply early pressure while maintaining control of the board through land destruction and disruption.

This deck revolves around quickly ramping up mana with enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum to cast powerful enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress. The goal is to draw through the deck with cards like Enchantress's Presence, Mirri's Guile and Replenish to set up a win condition with Opalescence and Parallax Wave. The deck also includes disruption with Seal of Cleansing and Sterling Grove to protect its combo pieces. Overall, the strategy focuses on efficiently chaining enchantments together to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory.

The focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. It aims to control the board with cards like Smokestack and Duress while also applying pressure with efficient creatures like Phyrexian Negator and Ravenous Rats. The deck also utilizes removal spells like Smother and Snuff Out to handle opposing threats. With a low mana curve and a mix of disruption and aggression, this Mono Black Aggro deck is designed to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in a premodern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and powerful removal spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggression. By using cards like Cabal Archon, Dark Supplicant, and Priest of Gix to generate an early board presence, backed up by efficient removal in Dark Ritual, Snuff Out, and Smother, the deck aims to control the game and close out matches quickly. Additionally, Rotlung Reanimator and Cabal Therapy provide additional utility and disruption, while Rishadan Port helps to limit the opponent's resources. With a strong focus on tempo and disruption, this deck aims to secure victory through relentless pressure and efficient plays.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize Oath of Druids to control the game by summoning powerful creatures like Terravore, while disrupting opponents with cards like Sphere of Resistance and Winter's Grasp. The deck also includes efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing, along with additional mana acceleration from Mox Diamond and land destruction from cards like Wasteland. The strategy revolves around establishing board control and outlasting opponents through a combination of creature threats and disruption spells.

This deck focuses on using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck has a toolbox approach, with a variety of creatures with different abilities to deal with various threats. It also has recursion with cards like Recurring Nightmare and Genesis to keep the engine going. The goal is to control the board and outvalue the opponent with card advantage and efficient creature removal.

This deck focuses on maintaining control of the game by disrupting opponents' strategies with counterspells, removal, and proactive creatures. By using a combination of efficient threats like Meddling Mage and Lightning Angel alongside versatile spells like Swords to Plowshares and Mana Leak, the deck aims to answer threats while advancing its own game plan. The deck also has card draw and selection tools to help find the right answers at the right time. mana base allows for consistent access to all necessary colors for powerful plays.

The focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Devourer and Fling, by using cards like Tinker to tutor for key pieces. Defense Grid and Tsabo's Web help protect the combo while disrupting the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to ramp up mana quickly with cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb, allowing for the combo to be assembled and executed in a timely manner. It also includes elements like Altar of Dementia and Mind Stone for additional utility and card advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to disrupt your opponent's strategy by controlling the board with cards like Coffin Purge and Smother, while also maintaining your own board presence with cards like Zombie Infestation and Nether Spirit. Contamination and Sickening Dreams provide additional control elements, while cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy help to further disrupt your opponent's hand. The deck aims to stay ahead on board presence and disrupt your opponent's plans until you can secure a win through attrition.
